name: PT Bank Sinarmas Tbk
summary: PT Bank Sinarmas Tbk provides various banking products and services in Indonesia. The company operates through Marketing and Credit, Treasury, and Trade Finance segments. It is involved in treasury activities; and the issuance of debt and trade financing activities. The company also invests in securities and money markets. It has 1 main branch, 68 branches, 1 functional sub-branch, 25 functional UMK offices, 3 functional UMK sharia offices, 133 sub-branches, 28 sharia branches, 143 cash offices, 12 sharia cash offices, and 3 cash cars in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Bank Shinta Indonesia and changed its name to PT Bank Sinarmas Tbk in January 2007. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Bank Sinarmas Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk.
